nasb.text: If your hand causes you to stumble, cut it off; it is better for you to enter life crippled, than, having your two hands, to go into hell, into the unquenchable fire,

esv.text: And if your hand causes you to sin, cut it off. It is better for you to enter life crippled than with two hands to go to hell,  to the unquenchable fire.

cnv.text: 如果你的一隻手使你犯罪，就把它砍下來。你身體殘廢進永生，總比有兩隻手下到地獄，進入那不滅的火裡好得多。

ccb.text: 如果你一只手使你犯罪，就砍掉它！

csbs.text: 如果你的一只手使你绊倒，就把它砍掉！对你来说，缺一只手进入永生，要比双手齐全下地狱，到那永不熄灭的火里好多了。
